G1.name: 基础设施
G1.description: Approval Gate 接线, Event Batch Drain, Scroll 加速

G2.name: 渲染优化
G2.description: Per-message 缓存, Formatter 注册表, Tool Collapse

G3.name: 增强 Widgets
G3.description: StatusBar 重设计, Todo Panel, InputWidget 改进

G4.name: 品牌完善
G4.description: Welcome Panel ASCII Art + 呼吸动画

key_decisions: ApprovalGate: Arc<Mutex<HashMap>> oneshot 通道，TUI 调用 gate.respond()
Per-message cache: Vec<(u64, Vec<Line>)> 按消息位置索引，content hash 失效
ToolFormatter: 动态 HashMap 注册表，支持 MCP 扩展
Scroll: 3 级加速 (3/6/12 lines)，200ms 方向窗口
Tool Collapse: CC 风格，默认折叠，Ctrl+O 最近 / Alt+O 全局
Event Batch: while try_next() drain loop before render
Todo Panel: 替代 Active Tools，需 engine AgentEvent::PlanUpdate
StatusBar: Unicode 符号 (✳ ▸ ◦ ↕ ⊞)，分层亮度，amber 品牌色
InputWidget: 去底框，mode-colored separator，ghost text + Tab accept
Welcome: ASCII Art OCTO (Tier 3) + 🦑 fallback (Tier 1/2)，amber 呼吸动画
notes: Phase U plan created from grid-tui gap analysis. 10 tasks in 4 groups + 1 deferred (Debug Panel redesign). Ready for execution.

deferred.description: Agent Debug Panel 重设计 — 信息整合到 StatusBar 后 Debug 面板需深入调整
deferred.precondition: Phase U G3 StatusBar 完成后

deferred.description: Agent Skills 系统是否符合标准规范 — 专题研究

previous_phase.name: Phase T — TUI OpenDev 整合
